heading: Savings provision
label: 3817 Savings provision
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be deemed to amend any provision of the National Security Act of 1947 () [ et seq.].61 Stat. 49550 U.S.C. 3001
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.act June 24, 1948, ch. 62562 Stat. 604The National Security Act of 1947 (), referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 44 (§ 3001 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.61 Stat. 495act July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 495
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 469 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
